notes: conditional: Azure CDN (Front Door Standard/Premium) supports HTTPS-only delivery and WAF policy association; public origin restricted via origin access control; customer must configure HTTPS-only, WAF policy, and origin private link; no single ARM toggle | CDN classic has no publicNetworkAccess ARM toggle. Restrict requires WAF policy with DeliveryPolicy rules OR migration to Azure Front Door Standard/Premium. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cdn/cdn-restrict-access-by-country-region

conditional: Azure CDN Premium supports Private Link for origin connections; classic Azure CDN does NOT support private link; condition on profile SKU | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/content-delivery-network-security-baseline | CDN classic Private Link for origins: GA in CDN Premium from Verizon SKU; Standard SKU does not support Private Link origins. ARM: Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/endpoints/originGroups/origins with privateLinkResourceId. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cdn/cdn-private-endpoint
